scripts.dev: concurrently -n WEB,MOBILE -c blue,green "npm run web:start" "npm run mobile:start"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n BACKEND,WEB,MOBILE -c yellow,blue,green "npm run backend:start" "npm run web:start" "npm run mobile:start"
scripts.dev:core: concurrently -n BACKEND,WEB -c yellow,blue "npm run backend:start" "npm run web:start"
